action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 achieved a new best worst-region accuracy of 0.4817. The combination of Importance Weighting and EMA was highly effective. Analysis: We have 1.87 hours remaining, which is enough for exactly one more full 12-epoch training run (~1.4 hours). To squeeze out the final bit of performance, I will increase the strength of the region weighting by changing the power from 0.5 (square root) to 0.75, which will give a stronger penalty for errors on minority regions like Africa and Oceania. I will also add RandomVerticalFlip to the augmentations, as satellite imagery is rotation-invariant and this provides 2x more spatial variation without risking the artifacts of RandAugment. Decision: Update train.py with stronger region weights and RandomVerticalFlip, train for 12 epochs, and submit the final evaluation.
